---
title: "Doctor Visits (County) Indicator Analysis"
subtitle: "Exploratory data analysis of Doctor Visits and comparative evaluation against JHU COVID-19 cases at the county level."
toc: false
---

This page provides access to the exploratory data analysis and comparative evaluation reports for doctor visits indicators.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
### <i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i> Candidate EDA

Evaluation of the **Doctor Visits: Smoothed Adj CLI** signal.

- [<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-bar-graph"></i> View Candidate EDA Report](eval_doctor_visits_smoothed_adj_cli_api_county.html)
  
  Exploratory analysis of the candidate indicator's spatial and temporal coverage, missingness, and data distributions across US counties.
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### <i class="bi bi-intersect"></i> County Comparison

Comparison against the **JHU COVID-19 Cases** guiding indicator.

- [<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-diff"></i> View JHU Cases Comparison Report](eval_jhu_csse_vs_doctor_visits_api_county.html)
  
  Detailed comparative analysis assessing correlations, lead/lag relationships, and back-revision behavior against JHU Cases data.
:::

:::
